ab: inaak tu tama ngaan hai Biung.
inaak tu cina ngaan hai Savi.
aizaan a saikin mas tasa tu tuhasnanaz, tupaun a saia tu Tahai, aip hai pun11 tu hamisan.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫Tahai，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is Tahai, he is 11 years old.

ab: muskun kaimin isian tasa tu pasnanavaan isnavaan.
ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: mazima saikin siin inaak tu tuhasnanaz kahuzas.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: mazima saikin sunghaul, mais islunghu hai, muskun a kaimin tastulumah kudiip sunghaul.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: mazima saikin mapasahaal mas bahlu tu kaviaz, mahtu kaimin muskun kahuzas siin sunghaul.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
